yesterdayStoryline.headline: Merino seals late win as Spain reach semis
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: 88th-minute strike sends Spain past Belgium in a tight quarter-final

todayStoryline.headline: England meet Norway; Argentina face Switzerland
todayStoryline.subtitle: Two knockout ties scheduled under warm US summer conditions

yesterday.scorers: Fabián Ruiz 30' (ESP) · Charles De Ketelaere 41' (BEL) · Mikel Merino 88' (ESP)

lines: Spain controlled possession but struggled for clear chances until a late rebound.
Merino's 88th-minute finish sends Spain into the semi-finals to face France next.

news.headline: WHO warns Ebola outbreak remains active in DRC and Uganda
news.body: The World Health Organization said the Bundibugyo ebolavirus outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda remains active, with new confirmed cases reported. WHO flagged containment challenges including insecurity and limited vaccine options, urging accelerated international support and surveillance.
